title: runtime/llm_settings
description: Persisted LLM settings metadata. Never includes api_key plaintext.

base_url.description: Optional API base URL (required for openai_compatible presets).

configured.description: True when provider + model_id are set and an API key exists in keyring (Ollama may use empty key).

has_api_key.description: True when a secret is stored in OS keyring. Never returns the key itself.
